title: Equivalent fractions with fraction models (denominators 10 & 100)
description: Practice writing equivalent fractions with denominators of 10 and 100. These problems give you pictures to help you find the answer.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equation to make an equivalent fraction.**

$\dfrac8{10}=\dfrac{t}{100}$

${t}=$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]


[[☃ image 1]]


[[☃ image 2]]
hints:
Equivalent fractions have the same area shaded.  

How many $\text{\greenD{hundredths}}$ should we shade to cover the same area as $\blueD{\dfrac8{10}}?$

options.alt: Two squares, one square divided into ten equal-sized rows with the bottom 8 rows shaded blue.
A second square is divided into 10 equal-size rows, each made up of 10 equal-size squares. No squares are shaded.  An equal sign separates the two squares.
